title: P-024+P-025+P-026: three process rules into ORCHESTRATION.md (proportional verification, test-discovery precision, verbatim-promotion definition)
description: Owned file: ORCHESTRATION.md ONLY. Additive, minimal diff, match the existing voice (see the U2/U4/F6 additions for style). (1) P-024 near the roles/F6 area: verification effort scales with blast radius; verifier tier defaults sonnet, coordinator overrides to opus per-dispatch for NLAH mutations, guardrail changes, epic joins, tournament promotions (cite state.json cost_policy). (2) P-025 near the lifecycle/notes area: acceptance criteria MUST carry the exact layout-matching test command; verifiers MUST assert a NONZERO executed-test count before trusting a green (cite the bare node --test false-green precedent, T-044/T-052). (3) P-026 in the tournament pattern section 5: 'verbatim promotion' = algorithm byte-verbatim PLUS legitimate decoupling (candidate-identifying strings renamed, candidate self-test blocks stripped, zero runtime requires of candidates/) - cite T-049. Acceptance: three rules greppable (P-024/P-025/P-026 or their keywords), diff additions-only, section headers unchanged, markdown renders.

notes.note: plan: add P-024 (proportional verification, sec4 near F6), P-025 (test-discovery precision, sec2 lifecycle), P-026 (verbatim-promotion definition, sec5 tournament pattern) - additive only, headers unchanged

HANDOFF -> verifier: T-057 P-024+P-025+P-026 shipped in ORCHESTRATION.md, additive-only. REPLAY (from repo root):
(1) greppable: grep -n P-024 ORCHESTRATION.md ; grep -n P-025 ORCHESTRATION.md ; grep -n P-026 ORCHESTRATION.md -> all 3 present (P-025 line 71 sec2 lifecycle, P-024 line 117 sec4 near F6, P-026 line 150 sec5 tournament pattern).
(2) additions-only diff: git diff --stat ORCHESTRATION.md -> 1 file changed, 26 insertions(+), 0 deletions; git diff ORCHESTRATION.md | grep '^-' | grep -v '^--- ' -> empty (only the diff meta line matched, confirmed zero content lines removed).
(3) headers unchanged: git diff HEAD -- ORCHESTRATION.md | grep '^[+-]#' -> empty (no # header line touched).
(4) markdown renders: bold-marker (**) count is even (56) i.e. balanced across the file after the 3 additions; no header/list-structure breakage, each addition placed as a paragraph or nested bullet inside its existing section (2, 4, 5) with unchanged section titles.
Content shipped verbatim (see file): P-025 cites the bare `node --test` false-green on cronsplain tests/test_*.js layout (T-044/T-052) and mandates a nonzero executed-test-count assertion plus the layout-matching command `node --test tests/*.js`. P-024 cites state.json cost_policy rules 1-2 + the 2026-07-05 operator directive, ties verifier tier default (sonnet) + coordinator opus override to NLAH mutations/guardrail changes/epic joins/tournament promotions. P-026 defines verbatim promotion (byte-identical + legitimate decoupling: renamed candidate-identifying strings, stripped self-test/__main__, zero runtime requires of candidates/) citing T-049's schedule.js promotion fidelity note.
Verifier: replay (1)-(4), read the 3 added paragraphs in context, confirm voice/style match existing U2/U4/F6 additions (bold-name-with-code, precedent citation, no rewritten prose elsewhere).

VERIFIED T-057 (verifier-b, independent replay via git-diff/grep + static read, different method than producer bold-marker-count approach): (1) grep -n P-024/P-025/P-026 ORCHESTRATION.md -> P-025 at line 71 (inside sec2 lifecycle, lines 38-81, right after the note-taxonomy table), P-024 at line 117 (inside sec4 roles/engines, lines 100-143, right after the F6 verifier-rotation paragraph), P-026 at line 150 (inside sec5 topology patterns, lines 143-162, inside the tournament/consensus bullet) -- all three land in the specified sections.
